recap: Added integration test verifying script and function chains resolve from ~/.oroshi when outside any worktree
Added integration test verifying script and function chains resolve from a detected oroshi worktree by creating a real worktree with overwritten leaf fixtures
Added integration test for disable mechanism; fixed fpath reload (always run, autoload marks not inherited) and ZDOTDIR in bats_disable_worktree_aware so child zsh uses worktree's zshenv-host.zsh
